auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ipdata API key passed as the api-key query parameter. Sign up for a free key or view authentication examples in the docs: https://docs.ipdata.co/reference/authentication.

actions.name: bulk_lookup
actions.description: Look up up to 100 IP addresses in a single ipdata bulk API request.

items.description: An IPv4 or IPv6 address to include in the bulk lookup.

ips.description: The list of IP addresses to submit to the ipdata bulk lookup endpoint.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for performing a bulk IP lookup.

ip.description: The IP address that was looked up.

is_eu.description: Whether the IP address is located in the European Union.

flag.description: The flag asset returned by ipdata.

emoji_unicode.description: The Unicode codepoints for the country flag emoji.

code.description: The IETF or ISO language code.

items.description: A language entry returned by ipdata.

languages.description: The languages associated with the IP location.

offset.description: The UTC offset string such as "-0700".

is_dst.description: Whether daylight saving time is currently in effect.

current_time.description: The current local time in ISO 8601 format.

time_zone.description: Time zone data returned by ipdata.

is_tor.description: Whether the IP address is identified as Tor.

is_icloud_relay.description: Whether the IP address is identified as iCloud Private Relay.

is_proxy.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a proxy.

is_anonymous.description: Whether the IP address is identified as anonymous.

is_known_attacker.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a known attacker.

is_known_abuser.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a known abuser.

is_threat.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a threat.

is_bogon.description: Whether the IP address is identified as a bogon.

threat.description: Threat intelligence data returned by ipdata.

type.description: The organization type returned by ipdata.

network.description: The network associated with the company.

name.description: The carrier or network operator name.

asn.description: The autonomous system number in AS-prefixed format.

route.description: The route announced by the autonomous system.

asn.description: Autonomous system data returned by ipdata.

count.description: The request usage count returned by ipdata.

items.description: The full IP intelligence payload returned by ipdata.

outputSchema.description: The array of IP intelligence payloads returned by the ipdata bulk lookup.

actions.name: get_calling_code
actions.description: Look up the calling_code field for a specific IP address or the caller's current IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up. Omit this field to use the caller's current IP.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an ipdata field lookup.

outputSchema.description: The calling_code value returned by ipdata.

actions.name: get_time_zone_by_ip

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an ipdata field lookup.

actions.name: lookup_advanced_asn
actions.description: Look up advanced autonomous system details by ASN number with the ipdata ASN endpoint.

asn.description: The autonomous system number as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for looking up an autonomous system by ASN number.

asn.description: The autonomous system number in AS-prefixed format.

route.description: The route announced by the autonomous system.

usage.description: The usage classification for the autonomous system.

ipv4_prefixes.description: The IPv4 prefixes announced by the autonomous system.

ipv6_prefixes.description: The IPv6 prefixes announced by the autonomous system.

num_ips.description: The number of IP addresses associated with the autonomous system.

registry.description: The regional internet registry that manages the autonomous system.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the autonomous system.

date.description: The registration date for the autonomous system.

status.description: The allocation status for the autonomous system.

upstream.description: The upstream autonomous systems associated with the autonomous system.

downstream.description: The downstream autonomous systems associated with the autonomous system.

peers.description: The peer autonomous systems associated with the autonomous system.

outputSchema.description: Advanced autonomous system data returned by ipdata.

actions.name: lookup_basic_asn_by_ip
actions.description: Look up a specific IP address and return only the ASN object from the ipdata response.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for looking up a specific IP address.

asn.description: The autonomous system number in AS-prefixed format.

route.description: The route announced by the autonomous system.

outputSchema.description: Autonomous system data returned by ipdata.
